paths.title: Complete Course
paths.description: All 16 lessons in recommended pedagogical order.

paths.title: Fast Track — Core Architecture
paths.description: Skip debate lessons. Covers the primary architectural patterns and implementation paths.

paths.title: Backend and Data Layer Path
paths.description: Focus on server-side: TypeScript, schema-as-type, RLS, pgvector, RAG, and security.

paths.title: Frontend and Realtime Path
paths.description: Focus on client-side: React 18, immutability, collaborative editing, and AI streaming.

paths.title: Security Deep Dive
paths.description: Full security focus path including schema, RLS, authentication, and attack vectors.
